parsed.production_notes: The video features human actors in real-world settings. The AI tutor is represented by a static photograph of a human model, with a human voiceover, not by AI-generated video or animation.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her mid-20s with a medium build and a brown complexion. She has dark brown, shoulder-length hair, often tied back in a low ponytail, and a round face with expressive dark eyes. She has a small tattoo on her left wrist.
characters.wardrobe: A short-sleeved, collared black polo shirt and light-wash blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially dejected and sad, she becomes progressively more engaged, hopeful, and finally happy and confident.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his mid-20s with a slim build and a medium complexion. He has short, dark, curly hair, a mustache, and wears black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored, possibly off-white, collared shirt.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, wavy, dark brown hair parted on the side, and a small red bindi on her forehead. She has a warm, friendly smile.
characters.wardrobe: A bright pink sleeveless blouse and a matching pink saree with a gold border draped over her shoulder. She wears a delicate gold necklace and traditional gold jhumka earrings.

scenes.setting: An office reception area. A dark grey wall with a large circular logo ('Juniper') is in the background. A clock on the wall reads 10:10. A marble-topped reception desk is in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: In an office reception area, Character B, a young man with glasses, sits behind a desk looking up and speaking dismissively to Character A, a young woman. Character A stands in front of the desk, looking downcast and disappointed. The lighting is neutral indoor office lighting. The shot is a stable medium frame capturing both individuals in their interaction.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot of a job interview rejection. Character B sits behind a reception desk, speaking condescendingly to Character A, who stands before him looking dejected. The company logo 'Juniper' is visible on the wall behind them. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen corresponding to the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: English ಬರಲ್ವಾ? [Don't know English?]
Character B says: ಕೆಲಸ ಬೇಕಾ ನಿಂಗೆ? [You want a job?]
Character B says: ಇಲ್ಲೆಲ್ಲ ನಿಮ್ಮಂತೋರ್ಗೆ ಕೆಲಸ ಇಲ್ಲ. [There's no job for people like you here.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English baralwa?
Kelasa bekaa ninge?
Illella nimmanthorge kelasa illa.

scenes.setting: A modern, well-lit living room. Character A is on a teal-colored couch with decorative pillows. A large window with sheer curtains is behind her, and a potted plant is visible nearby.

panels.panel_visual_description: A static, studio-lit medium close-up shot of Character C, a smiling young woman in a pink saree. She looks directly at the camera with a warm, inviting expression against a plain, solid white background. Her pose and expression do not change throughout the scene.

A medium shot of Character A sitting on a teal couch in her living room, holding a smartphone and looking at it. Her expression changes throughout the scene, starting as sad and frustrated, then becoming attentive, and eventually shifting to surprised and happy. She holds a pillow in her lap. The room is brightly lit by natural light from a window behind her.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen conversation. The top panel shows a static, smiling image of the AI tutor, Character C. The bottom panel shows a live-action video of the user, Character A, sitting on her couch and interacting with her phone. Subtitles for the conversation appear in an orange box, overlaid on the video panels.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: ಇಷ್ಟು ದುಃಖವಾಗಿದ್ದು ಯಾಕೆ? [Why are you so sad?]
Character A says: ಎಲ್ಲ ಸತಿ ಕ್ವಾಲಿಫೈ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ, ಕೆಲಸ ಕೂಡ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗ್ ಬರುತ್ತೆ. ಆದ್ರೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಂದ ಯಾವಾಗ್ಲೂ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [I qualify every time, I even know the work well. But because of English, I always get rejected.]
Character C says: ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ ಕಾಮನ್ ಆಗಿದೆ ಮತ್ತು ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಇದನ್ನ ಫಿಕ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಇವತ್ತು ನಾವು ಇಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡೋಣ. [This is very common and with practice, it can be fixed. Today, let's start from here.]
Character A says: ಓಕೆ. [Okay.]
Character C says: ನಿಮ್ಮ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ನನಗೆ ಹೇಳಿ. [Tell me about yourself.]
Character A says: ನನ್ ಹೆಸರು ಪ್ರಿಯಾ. ನನಗೆ ಮೂರು ವರ್ಷದ ಎಕ್ಸ್ಪೀರಿಯನ್ಸ್ ಇದೆ ಕಸ್ಟಮರ್ ಹ್ಯಾಂಡ್ಲಿಂಗ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ. ಹಾರ್ಡ್ ವರ್ಕಿಂಗ್ ಕೂಡ ಇದೀನಿ. [My name is Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling. I am also hardworking.]
Character C says: ಇದನ್ನು ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳಿ, I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person. [Say it like this, I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.]
Character A says: Wow! ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ easy ಇತ್ತು. [Wow! This was very easy.]
Character C says: ನಾನು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೊತೆಗೆ ಇಪ್ಪತ್ತನಾಲ್ಕು ಗಂಟೆ ಅವೈಲಬಲ್ ಇರ್ತೀನಿ. ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದ್ರು fifteen minutes ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಸಾಕು. [I am available with you 24 hours. Practicing for fifteen minutes whenever you want is enough.]
Character A says: ನಾನ್ ಎಷ್ಟು ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋ ತರ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ? [In how many days will I be able to speak English well?]
Character C says: ಕೇವಲ ಇಪ್ಪತ್ತು ದಿನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ. ನೀವು ನನಗೆ ಯಾವುದೇ ಕ್ವೆಶ್ಚನ್ ಕೇಳಿ. ನಾನು ನಿಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಆನ್ಸರ್ ಕೊಡೋದನ್ನು ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೇನೆ ಮತ್ತು ತಪ್ಪುಗಳನ್ನ ರಿಯಲ್ ಟೀಚರ್ ತರ ಕರೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Just practice with me for twenty days. You can ask me any question. I will teach you how to answer in English and correct your mistakes like a real teacher.]
Character A says: ಹೌದಾ? ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದೆಲ್ಲ ಕೇಳಿ ದುಬಾರಿ ಇದೆ ಅನ್ಸತ್ತೆ. [Really? But this all sounds expensive.]
Character C says: ಬಿಲ್ಕುಲ್ ಇಲ್ಲ, ಸಿರ್ಫ್ 2 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಪರ್ ಡೇ ಅಲ್ಲಿ 7 ದಿನಗಳ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ತಗೋಬಹುದು. [Not at all, you can take a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees per day.]
Character A says: ಹೌದಾ? ನಾನ್ ಈಗಲೇ SpeakX ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Really? I'll download the SpeakX app right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Ishtu dukhavagiddu yaake?
Ella sati qualify maadtini,
kelasa kooda chennag barutte.
Aadre English inda
yaavaglu reject aagtini.
Idu tumba common aagide
mattu practice maadidre
idanna fix maadbahudu.
Ivattu naavu illinda
shuru maadona.
Okay.
Nimma bagge nanage heli.
Nan hesaru Priya.
Nanage mooru varshada
experience ide customer
handling alli.
Hard working kooda iddini.
Idanna heege heli,

idella keli dubaari

alli 7 dinagala

scenes.setting: A graphic background with white on top and orange on the bottom.

panels.panel_visual_description: A centered, front-facing mockup of a modern smartphone with a notch at the top. The phone is displayed against a clean, two-toned background, which is white at the top and orange at the bottom. The screen of the phone is illuminated.

scenes.visual_description: An end card for the SpeakX app. The brand logo is at the top left. Large orange text says 'Download SpeakX App'. Below this, a smartphone shows the app's premium features: 'Learn with Personal AI Mentor', 'Unlock Unlimited Exercises', '100+ Real Life Scenarios', and 'Get Personalised Feedback'. At the bottom, an orange banner has a countdown timer 'OFFER ENDS IN 00:09:20' and a button that says 'Start 7 Days Trial Now'.
